policy: Maximum 5% per position; large-cap stocks only; never act on an unverified tip; always ask the user before placing or confirming an order.

results.transcript: Good afternoon. The Federal Open Market Committee decided today to lower the target range for the federal funds rate by a quarter percentage point. We are committed to maintaining a strong economy and stable prices.
